mechanics.excerpt: Note that this skill should not replace planning by the play- er characters If the gamemaster has decided that he wants the setting to be military campaign the characters may use this skill to help formulate their strategy; but they should be respon: sible for coming up with and executing the actual battle plan_ SURVIVAL The Survival Skill enables characters t0 survive unprotect- ed in hostile environments that might otherwise prove Iethal, Characters who are exposed t0 hostile environments for long periods must make weekly Survival Skill Checks remain healthy: Modifiers should be based on the severity of the envi: ronment; available survival gear; and the amount of time the char- acter has been exposed tO dangerous conditions (for every suC cessive week add another +1 Modifier).
